title: Practice Exam 1 Materials
content:
Hi Class,

In order to better prepare you for the exam, here are some additional resources related to Exam 1. 

  • I have posted a practice exam in Canvas, along with the solutions (in words documents).
  • I also posted several Canvas Quiz Practice problems. 

These are in a section called: Exam-Related Materials (Click Link, or see image below)
contentText:
